title: nervilia bicarinata
intro: Nervilia bicarinata, also known as the spotted fan petal orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Nervilia bicarinata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds due to its antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to make a tea or decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
